lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust, deep scratches, and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery and visible damage. Mechanical systems require major repairs and are currently not fully functional.

Check out this solid and reliable vehicle that's ready for its next chapter! While it shows some expected wear and tear from its journeys, it remains a functional and dependable choice for your daily needs. It’s in fair condition and offers a great opportunity to get on the road at an affordable price point!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It has significant mechanical issues, including a slipping transmission and an engine that requires a complete overhaul. The body shows extensive rust on the panels and several deep dents, while the interior has multiple tears in the seats and non-functional air conditioning. This car is best suited as a project for a dedicated mechanic or for salvage parts.

This vehicle is in fair overall condition and serves as a functional daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. Mechanically, the engine starts reliably and runs well, although it may require a routine tune-up in the near future to maintain optimal performance. The transmission shifts through all gears, though you might notice some typical age-related stiffness. The exterior features original paint that has some fading on the roof and hood, along with minor door dings and surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean but the upholstery shows visible wear, particularly on the driver's side bolster. All essential safety features and electronics are operational, including the headlights and wipers, though the air conditioning currently requires a recharge. This car is ideal for someone seeking basic, honest transportation and who is comfortable performing minor cosmetic or mechanical upkeep over time.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and consistent service history. Ideal for the professional seeking a dependable yet sophisticated driving experience, this vehicle stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable car for me and is still in really solid shape. It drives beautifully and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve made sure to keep up with the basics so it's ready to hit the road with you right away. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have!

This 996.2 Carrera features the refined 3.6L M96/03 flat-six power plant, delivering 320hp through a precise G96 6-speed manual transaxle. The engine benefits from Variocam Plus valve timing, ensuring a linear torque curve across the rev range. This example maintains excellent mechanical integrity with a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recent cooling system overhaul, including a new water pump and low-temp thermostat. Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Minor exterior wear. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained luxury SUV strikes the perfect balance between performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine with only minor stone chips consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple, showing minimal wear on the driver’s side bolster, while the cabin stays whisper-quiet at speed. Every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is in strong shape, having received regular synthetic oil changes and a recent comprehensive brake service. It starts reliably every morning and provides a smooth, confident ride. Included are two sets of keys and a complete service history log. This is a dependable vehicle that is ready for many more miles of worry-free driving.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in great shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for anyone looking for a solid, dependable car that still looks sharp on the road. I've kept up with the maintenance, so it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission pairs with a factory limited-slip differential for precise torque vectoring. Mechanical integrity is prioritized with a reinforced rear subframe, recent rod bearing replacement, and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The chassis remains composed on Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, preserving the model's signature steering feedback and mechanical grip. A well-sorted, driver-focused machine with a documented service history.
Used car in good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

Step inside to a pristine, smoke-free cabin where the leather upholstery remains supple and the dashboard displays no cracks or sun damage. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has been serviced religiously at scheduled intervals, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records available for your review. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining for the seasons ahead. It is a reliable, handsome car that perfectly balances everyday utility with sophisticated comfort. Ready for its next owner with two sets of keys and a fresh professional detail.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s been super reliable for me and is still in great shape—runs like a total dream! It's been well-loved and well-maintained, making it perfect for someone who wants a solid, high-quality ride. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take it for a spin. Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8. This high-revving power unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and a cross-bank exhaust manifold to deliver a linear power band up to an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is routed through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to the rear wheels via a Variable M Differential Lock. The chassis remains taut with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing adjustable compression and rebound settings. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing inspection and throttle actuator service, ensuring the structural integrity of the rotating assembly. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the vehicle retains its factory-tuned turn-in response and lateral stability. A driver-focused example ready for the apex.
Used car in good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Runs well. Interior clean.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with comfort. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring supportive seating and intuitive controls that all function as intended. Mechanically, the car is in solid shape; it has been treated to regular oil changes and routine maintenance, ensuring a smooth, responsive ride and reliable ignition every time. It’s a dependable, turn-key vehicle perfect for anyone seeking quality and longevity without the brand-new price tag.
